title: caltha andicola
intro: Caltha andicola, also known as the Andean marsh marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Caltha andicola include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Caltha andicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
